{{CargoRelic
|name=Emerald Tablet
|class_id=22288
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=06-10
|source=
|description=On Jun 10, 1900 BC, Hermes Trismegistus recorded the knowledge of alchemy on an emerald tablet which has been handed down for thousands of years.<br>The Emerald Tablet, attributed to Hermes Trismegistus, is one of the earliest alchemical documents introduced to Europe. It condenses the knowledge of alchemy into fourteen lines. In addition to the method of the creation of the Philosopher's Stone, it also integrates guidance on contacting spirit and self-improvement. It is said that the alchemists in the Middle Ages would see the Emerald Tablet as the most important principle and hang it in their workplaces.
|fame=59
|art=75
|fth=109
|civ=52
|tech=67
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop Earth DMG +12<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop Wind DMG +12
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop Earth DMG +14<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop Wind DMG +14
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop Earth DMG +16<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop Wind DMG +16
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop Earth DMG +20<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop Wind DMG +20
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop Earth DMG +24<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop Wind DMG +24
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop Earth DMG +30<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop Wind DMG +30
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop Earth DMG +30<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop Wind DMG +30<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Kemet skill III.png|50px]]Place in Kemetic Museum: In Kemet, Snail ATK +600
|skill2=[[File:Kemet skill III.png|50px]]Place in Kemetic Museum: Medal Cost for Grandmaster Scrolls -300
|skill3=[[File:Kemet skill III.png|50px]]Place in Kemetic Museum: This Relic's FTH +15
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Primal Alchemy|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Relic RF, +15|orange}}
|3name=Earth Rune|3rec=79.43M|3atk=233306|3defense=155647|3hp=13808262|3weak=30791
|4name=Wind Rune|4rec=105.06M|4atk=287356|4defense=191707|4hp=19886408|4weak=35384
|5name=Water Rune|5rec=135.02M|5atk=350542|5defense=233860|5hp=27623355|5weak=40086
|6name=Fire Rune|6rec=169.31M|6atk=422862|6defense=282108|6hp=38050810|6weak=46761
|Arec=208.47M|Aatk=505439|Adefense=337198|Ahp=51225631|Aweak=52958
}}}}
